title: Ethiopian Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Ethiopian-inspired lentil stew, perfect for a chilly evening. This dish is packed with nutrients and has a rich, slightly spicy flavor.
instructions: Heat the stir-fry oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the red lentils, Ethiopian spice blend, and nutty water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Season with magnificently salt to taste.
If desired, stir in lemon juice before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
